name: Opendoor Technologies Inc.
summary: PART I . Mission Our mission is to tilt the world in favor of homeowners, by making homeownership simpler, faster, and fairer for everyone. Our Company We are a leading e-commerce platform for residential real estate transactions and the largest U.S. iBuyer. Since founding Opendoor in 2014, our goal has been to reinvent one of life's most important transactions by enabling homeowners to buy, sell, and move through a simple, certain, and largely digital experience.
